list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Follows an angry convict seeking vengeance against his former girlfriend who betrayed him.
list.vod_content: Follows an angry convict seeking vengeance against his former girlfriend who betrayed him.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;The story revolves around 27-year-old Nourqui who has immigrated illegally to Marseille and wh
list.vod_content: The story revolves around 27-year-old Nourqui who has immigrated illegally to Marseille and who gets by on petty crime, living a marginal and festive life with his friends. From 1990 to 2000, Nour loves, grows older and clings to his dreams, damaged by the melancholy of an irreversible exile...

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;First-time feature director and award-winning comedian Simon Glassman comes to Fantasia with t
list.vod_content: First-time feature director and award-winning comedian Simon Glassman comes to Fantasia with the cosmic horror, BUFFET INFINITY! Picking from hundreds of hours of original, low-budget TV ads, Glassman tells the sinister tale of two restaurants battling it out in the town of Westridge County. Insurance ads, used car rivals, and plugs for a local religious scholar and recording artist, Langdon P. Hershey, all converge to tell the story of an expanding sinkhole, a cult, and an ever-growing restaurant that becomes unsettlingly sentient.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Ten minutes a day can change the course of the day. Ten minutes of doing something completely
list.vod_content: Ten minutes a day can change the course of the day. Ten minutes of doing something completely new can change the course of a life. This is what Bianca will discover in the midst of an existential crisis. New encounters, the discovery of special bonds and listening to those who have always loved us. Sometimes it takes very little to start over and this film teaches us, through a warm and exciting tale of rebirth.

list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;Lucas a 37-year-old man and the 86 year-old woman Antonia, who live together in a city. Lucas
list.vod_content: Lucas a 37-year-old man and the 86 year-old woman Antonia, who live together in a city. Lucas is looking for a job but the job seems not to be looking for him.
